Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Lindon's skeletal Remnant arm]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon's skeletal Remnant arm can catch and drain energy from metal spheres.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon grabbed for the gem with his Remnant arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon struck with his Remnant arm.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon uses his Remnant hand to grab Kiro's armor.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — Force madra rushed through Lindon's Remnant arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon has a Remnant arm that twitches with disorder in his spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon's Remnant arm is a limb that can consume spiritual energy.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon's Remnant arm is a part of his body that requires less maintenance than a normal construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon's Remnant arm takes most of its sustenance from his pure madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Lindon has a Remnant hand.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon's arm possesses hunger.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
